```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

cat(sep = "\n", c(
  paste0(sR$headerList$numberOfDepartments, ":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ", dR$numberOfDepartments),
  "",
  paste0(sR$headerList$numberOfPatients, ":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ", dR$numberOfPatients),
  "",
  paste0(sR$headerList$numberOfAdmissions, ":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ", dR$numberOfAdmissions,
    if (dR$numberOfAdmissions != dR$numberOfPatients)
      paste0("^[", sR$headerList$admissionsExceedRecordsNote, "]")
    else ""),
  "",
  paste0(sR$headerList$sumOfPatientDays, ":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ", dR$sumOfPatientDays),
  "",
  paste0(sR$headerList$averageSurveillancePeriod, ":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ", dR$averageSurveillancePeriod, " days")
))
```
